label.purpose: Step labels, severity tags, terminal text — the machine's voice.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: The floating party-chat dock — a true overlay.

shadows.name: inset-glow
shadows.purpose: Faint violet inner edge on terminal blocks — atmosphere, not elevation.

motion.name: ease-quick
motion.purpose: Border/background/box-shadow state transitions on seg-buttons, chips.

motion.name: cursor-blink
motion.purpose: Terminal block cursor. Suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: pulse
motion.purpose: Active party-turn indicator. Suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The forward action on every step (Next, Approve, Copy).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7c5cd6; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: .75rem 1rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background .12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #8d6ee6; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(187,154,247,.35); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Segmented Selector
components.description: Radio-as-card calibration control; the whole card is the target.
components.css: .ds-seg-btn { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .1rem; padding: .55rem .85rem; cursor: pointer; background: #1a1b28; border: 1px solid #313450; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color .12s, background .12s, box-shadow .12s; } .ds-seg-btn:hover { border-color: #bb9af7; } .ds-seg-selected { border-color: #bb9af7; background: rgba(187,154,247,.12); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #bb9af7; } .ds-seg-name { font-weight: 600; color: #c6cbe3; } .ds-seg-hint { color: #7e86ac; font-size: .75rem; }

components.name: Example Chip
components.description: Pill-shaped quick-pick for refine examples and history actions.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-size: .75rem; padding: .12rem .6rem; border: 1px solid #2a2c3e; border-radius: 999px; color: #7e86ac; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all .12s; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #bb9af7; color: #bb9af7; background: rgba(187,154,247,.08); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Endpoint/idea fields; violet glow on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #1a1b28; color: #c6cbe3; border: 1px solid #313450; border-radius: 8px; padding: .5rem .75rem; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7e86ac; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #bb9af7; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(187,154,247,.35); }

components.name: Terminal / Activity Block
components.description: Signature component — the machine narrating its own work via SSE.
components.css: .ds-terminal { position: relative; padding: .6rem .9rem .6rem 2rem; font-family: 'Departure Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: .875rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #c8d3f5; background: #0b0b12; border: 1px solid #2a2c3e; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(124,92,214,.06); } .ds-terminal::before { content: '❯'; position: absolute; left: .85rem; color: #bb9af7; font-weight: 700; } .ds-terminal::after { content: '▋'; margin-left: .15rem; color: #bb9af7; animation: ds-blink 1.1s steps(1) infinite; } @keyframes ds-blink { 50% { opacity: 0; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-terminal::after { animation: none; } }

components.name: QA Finding (severity)
components.description: Lint/review finding; severity reads as full border + tint + colored tag.
components.css: .ds-finding { font-size: .875rem; padding: .4rem .6rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #2a2c3e; color: #c6cbe3; } .ds-sev { font-family: 'Departure Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 700; margin-right: .4rem; } .ds-sev-high { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, #f7768e 45%, #2a2c3e); background: color-mix(in srgb, #f7768e 8%, transparent); } .ds-sev-high .ds-sev { color: #f7768e; }

components.name: Round-Table Dock Header
components.description: Header of the floating chat dock during party review.
components.css: .ds-dock-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: .5rem; padding: .45rem .7rem; background: #7c5cd6; color: #fff; border-radius: 8px 8px 0 0; } .ds-dock-head strong { color: #fff; } .ds-dock-toggle { background: transparent; border: 0; color: #fff; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1; padding: 0 .25rem; }

narrative.overview: Incipit looks like a dark operator's console with the machine's work glowing through it. The surface is a near-black violet-tinted void; the one warm light is a soft violet glow from the top-right corner. Where the system is doing something, it speaks in a monospace terminal block with a ❯ prompt and a blinking cursor. The philosophy is transparency as craft: nothing hides behind a vague spinner. Density is deliberate and technical — a tool, not a landing page — spending its personality budget on a few committed moments rather than thin decoration.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, violet-tinted void (#16161f) with a single corner glow as the only warmth.
One accent hue: violet (#bb9af7 / #7c5cd6). No competing brand colors.
Monospace (Departure Mono) reserved for the machine's voice.
Tonal layering, not shadows, for depth. Shadows only on things that float.
Tokyo Night status palette for state, never decoration.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Violet is the only brand color. A second hue is only legal if it's a status color carrying actual state. Warmth comes from the corner glow and the violet, never a warm-tinted background.

rules.name: The State-Color Rule
rules.body: Red/amber/blue/green mean something happened. Forbidden as decoration, section accents, or palette variety.

rules.name: The Two-Step Rule
rules.body: UI text lives on exactly three sizes: 12px, 14px, 16px. Hierarchy is weight, color, and the heading scale — never a fourth in-between size.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Machine Rule
rules.body: Departure Mono is reserved for the program's own voice. Don't set prose or buttons in mono for flavor.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Cards, findings, and inputs are flat with a 1px hairline. A drop shadow means it literally floats (dock, modal, sticky bar). A resting card with a shadow is a 2014 tell.

dos: Do keep violet the only accent; let the four status colors carry state and nothing else.
Do use the terminal block whenever the program is working — show the machine, don't mask it with a generic spinner.
Do layer with the Void → Surface → Terminal-Black tonal ramp; keep resting surfaces flat with a 1px hairline.
Do hold UI text to 12 / 14 / 16px and carry hierarchy with weight and color.
Do signal state with a full border + faint tint (and a label/icon), never color alone — keep it WCAG AA and colorblind-safe.
Do reserve Departure Mono for the machine's voice.
donts: Don't ship the generic AI-SaaS look — no gradient text, hero-metric blocks, identical icon+heading card grids, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't drift toward a corporate dashboard — no business-blue, heavy chrome, or admin-panel data-table density for its own sake.
Don't go childish — no mascots, cartoon illustration, or emoji as decoration (functional 🌙 🎉 ✓ are fine).
Don't use a border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored stripe; state reads as a full border + tint.
Don't put a drop shadow on a resting surface; if it isn't floating, it's flat.
Don't introduce a warm-tinted or cream background; the glow and the violet are the warmth.
Don't invent a fourth small font size or set body/buttons in mono for flavor.
